title: প্রাথমিকে সংগীত শিক্ষক নিয়োগ বাতিলের সিদ্ধান্তে গাজীপুরে উদীচীর প্রতিবাদ কর্মসূচি
comment: Udichi is portrayed as a proactive cultural advocacy organization protesting a policy reversal they see as harmful to children's development, with their spokespersons' reasoned arguments presented uncritically and favorably, framing the organization as a legitimate civic voice for progressive cultural education.

title: বাউলশিল্পী আবুল সরকারের মুক্তি দাবি উদীচী ও চারণের
comment: Udichi is presented as a principled defender of artistic freedom and human rights, condemning what it calls an unjust, inhumane arrest of a folk singer and calling for public vigilance against religious persecution of dissent. The organization's strong moral stance against 'mob rule' and religious extremism is platformed sympathetically as courageous civic advocacy.

title: প্রাথমিকে সংগীত শিক্ষক নিয়োগ বাতিলের প্রতিবাদে ১৫ দিনের কর্মসূচি উদীচীর
comment: Udichi and allied cultural organizations are shown organizing a sustained, organized protest campaign against what they characterize as a communally-motivated policy reversal, with leaders' critiques of government capitulation to religious pressure presented at length and without rebuttal, framing Udichi as a determined progressive cultural force defending secular values.

title: স্কুলে সংগীত শিক্ষক পদ বাতিলের সিদ্ধান্ত প্রত্যাহারের দাবি জানাল উদীচী
comment: This article extensively platforms Udichi's detailed, reasoned statement advocating for children's holistic development through music and sports education, framing the organization as a thoughtful, humanistic voice defending secular cultural values and child welfare against what it sees as regressive policy.

title: মৌলিক সাংস্কৃতিক অধিকার বারবার হুমকির মুখে পড়ছে: উদীচী
comment: Udichi is portrayed as a principled defender of democratic and cultural freedoms, expressing concern over restrictions on artistic expression and calling for solidarity among progressive forces — presented as a legitimate civic watchdog voice without any critical counterpoint.

title: খাগড়াছড়িতে ধর্ষণের প্রতিবাদকারীদের ওপর সহিংসতার নিন্দা উদীচীর, জড়িতদের দৃষ্টান্তমূলক শাস্তির দাবি
comment: Udichi is presented sympathetically as a human rights advocate condemning violence against indigenous protesters and demanding justice and protection for a marginalized community — positioning the organization as a compassionate defender of minority rights.

title: প্রাথমিকে সংগীত শিক্ষক নিয়োগের সিদ্ধান্তকে স্বাগত জানাল উদীচী
comment: Udichi is shown welcoming a positive policy decision and articulating a thoughtful defense of music education's role in national history and moral development, framing the organization as a constructive, historically-grounded cultural voice.

title: উদীচীর ভারপ্রাপ্ত সভাপতি হলেন মাহমুদ সেলিম
comment: Routine, neutral organizational news about a leadership transition and administrative restructuring within Udichi, described factually without editorializing.

title: উদীচীর সভাপতি বদিউর রহমান আর নেই
comment: A respectful, neutral obituary reporting the death of Udichi's president, with the organization's grief and the deceased's long association with it noted factually and sympathetically as is customary in obituary coverage.

title: ‘বিয়াল্লিশের বিপ্লব’ দিয়ে আবারও যাত্রাপালা নিয়ে আসছে উদীচী
comment: This piece celebrates Udichi's revival of a traditional folk theater form (jatra) as part of its longstanding mission to preserve Bengali cultural heritage and anti-colonial/anti-imperialist themes, framing the organization as a dedicated, principled custodian of progressive folk culture across five decades.

title: এবার উদীচীর যাত্রাপালা
comment: Descriptive arts preview of Udichi's jatra production, framing the organization's mission as fighting for 'free people's free society' against self-serving imperialist collaborators and profiteers — presented admiringly as continuing a noble ideological and cultural tradition.

title: ৭ মার্চসহ তিনটি দিবস বাতিলের প্রতিবাদ জানিয়েছে উদীচী
comment: Udichi is portrayed as a principled guardian of national historical memory, protesting the cancellation of significant national days with detailed historical justification, framing the organization as defending the integrity of the liberation war narrative against what it calls politically motivated revisionism.

title: বর্ষবরণ উৎসবে বাধা, উদীচীর প্রতিবাদ
comment: Udichi is depicted as a victim of targeted obstruction and 'fascist collaborator' smears by local administrations preventing its cultural events, and as a vocal defender of secular festival traditions holding the interim government accountable for failing to protect free cultural expression — a sympathetic framing of the organization as besieged but resilient.

title: ২০ জুন উদীচীর ২৩তম সম্মেলনের ‘অসম্পূর্ণ নির্বাচনী অধিবেশন’ আহ্বান
comment: This article details internal organizational conflict within Udichi — chaotic, disputed leadership elections, rival factions, shouting matches disrupting a press conference — portraying the organization as embroiled in dysfunction and factional infighting, an unflattering internal governance picture, though presented as factual reporting rather than external criticism.

title: উদীচীর সম্মেলন ঘিরে ষড়যন্ত্রের কথা বললেন সভাপতি বদিউর রহমান
comment: This extensive account details severe internal dysfunction within Udichi — allegations of manipulation, a chaotic council session spiraling out of control, competing factions each declaring rival committees, and even claims of coercive handling of the elderly president. This portrays the organization's internal governance as troubled by conflict, procedural irregularities, and power struggles, a sustained negative institutional picture despite being reported factually via competing testimonies.

title: উদীচীর সংস্কৃতিকর্মী সমাবেশ: সহিংসতাকারীদের শাস্তি দাবি
comment: Udichi is portrayed as a principled organizer rallying against communal violence, destruction of cultural heritage, and minority persecution, calling for justice and national cultural renewal — framing the organization as a moral, unifying civic force in a moment of national crisis.

title: এবারের বাজেটও সংস্কৃতিকর্মীদের হতাশ করেছে: উদীচী
comment: Udichi is shown offering a reasoned, advocacy-based critique of inadequate cultural sector budget allocation, framing the organization as a legitimate voice representing the interests of cultural workers and secular national development.
